title: Mapping Surfaces: The Metric

visual_sequence.observation: Tissot ellipses show how coordinate steps become measured lengths.
Projection anisotropy appears as local ellipses.
The coefficients A, B, and F measure a coordinate parallelogram.
The same scale in every direction preserves angles.
Circles and lines survive the projection as inspectable images.
